channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by OpinionWay, 26–27 March 2026 – Seat Projections for the Parties
item.description:
• Parti socialiste–Place Publique (S&D): 9–13 seats
  • Lutte Ouvrière (*): 0 seats
  • Les Républicains (EPP): 8–11 seats
  • Reconquête (ESN): 0–5 seats
  • La France insoumise (GUE/NGL): 10–14 seats
  • Renaissance–Mouvement démocrate–Horizons (RE): 12–16 seats
  • Rassemblement national (PfE): 29–36 seats

item.title: Opinion Poll by OpinionWay, 26–27 March 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
item.description: TBD

item.title: Opinion Poll by OpinionWay, 26–27 March 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Parti socialiste–Place Publique (S&D): 11.5–15.7%
  • Lutte Ouvrière (*): 0.5–1.8%
  • Les Républicains (EPP): 9.7–13.6%
  • Reconquête (ESN): 3.8–6.5%
  • La France insoumise (GUE/NGL): 12.4–16.8%
  • Renaissance–Mouvement démocrate–Horizons (RE): 14.4–19.0%
  • Rassemblement national (PfE): 35.0–41.0%

item.title: Opinion Poll by ELABE for BFMTV and La Tribune Dimanche, 25–27 March 2026 – Seat Projections for the Parties
item.description:
• Parti socialiste–Place Publique (S&D): 8–11 seats
  • Lutte Ouvrière (*): 0 seats
  • Les Républicains (EPP): 4–7 seats
  • Reconquête (ESN): 0 seats
  • La France insoumise (GUE/NGL): 11–15 seats
  • Les Écologistes – Europe Écologie Les Verts (Greens/EFA): 0 seats
  • Renaissance–Mouvement démocrate–Horizons (RE): 13–17 seats
  • Rassemblement national (PfE): 35–40 seats
  • Debout la France (ECR): 0 seats
  • Parti communiste français (GUE/NGL): 0 seats
  • La France humaniste (*): 0–5 seats

item.title: Opinion Poll by ELABE for BFMTV and La Tribune Dimanche, 25–27 March 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
item.description: TBD

item.title: Opinion Poll by ELABE for BFMTV and La Tribune Dimanche, 25–27 March 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Parti socialiste–Place Publique (S&D): 8.4–11.4%
  • Lutte Ouvrière (*): 0.4–1.4%
  • Les Républicains (EPP): 5.0–7.5%
  • Reconquête (ESN): 2.9–4.9%
  • La France insoumise (GUE/NGL): 11.9–15.4%
  • Les Écologistes – Europe Écologie Les Verts (Greens/EFA): 2.7–4.6%
  • Renaissance–Mouvement démocrate–Horizons (RE): 13.4–17.2%
  • Rassemblement national (PfE): 34.9–39.9%
  • Debout la France (ECR): 1.8–3.4%
  • Parti communiste français (GUE/NGL): 2.5–4.3%
  • La France humaniste (*): 3.2–5.3%

item.title: Opinion Poll by Odoxa for Public Sénat, 25–26 March 2026 – Seat Projections for the Parties
item.description:
• Parti socialiste–Place Publique (S&D): 7–11 seats
  • Lutte Ouvrière (*): 0 seats
  • Les Républicains (EPP): 0–5 seats
  • Reconquête (ESN): 0–6 seats
  • La France insoumise (GUE/NGL): 9–14 seats
  • Les Écologistes – Europe Écologie Les Verts (Greens/EFA): 0–5 seats
  • Renaissance–Mouvement démocrate–Horizons (RE): 19–25 seats
  • Rassemblement national (PfE): 31–39 seats
  • Debout la France (ECR): 0 seats
  • Parti communiste français (GUE/NGL): 0 seats

item.title: Opinion Poll by Odoxa for Public Sénat, 25–26 March 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
item.description: TBD

item.title: Opinion Poll by Odoxa for Public Sénat, 25–26 March 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Parti socialiste–Place Publique (S&D): 8.3–12.1%
  • Lutte Ouvrière (*): 0.5–1.8%
  • Les Républicains (EPP): 2.9–5.4%
  • Reconquête (ESN): 3.8–6.5%
  • La France insoumise (GUE/NGL): 10.6–14.7%
  • Les Écologistes – Europe Écologie Les Verts (Greens/EFA): 3.4–5.9%
  • Renaissance–Mouvement démocrate–Horizons (RE): 20.5–25.7%
  • Rassemblement national (PfE): 33.1–39.0%
  • Debout la France (ECR): 1.3–3.1%
  • Parti communiste français (GUE/NGL): 1.3–3.1%

item.title: Opinion Poll by Harris Interactive for M6 and RTL, 22 March 2026 – Seat Projections for the Parties
item.description:
• Parti socialiste–Place Publique (S&D): 11–15 seats
  • Lutte Ouvrière (*): 0 seats
  • Les Républicains (EPP): 6–9 seats
  • Reconquête (ESN): 0–5 seats
  • La France insoumise (GUE/NGL): 9–13 seats

  • Renaissance–Mouvement démocrate–Horizons (RE): 12–16 seats
  • Rassemblement national (PfE): 28–36 seats
  • Debout la France (ECR): 0 seats
  • Parti communiste français (GUE/NGL): 0 seats

item.title: Opinion Poll by Harris Interactive for M6 and RTL, 22 March 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:

  • Lutte Ouvrière (*): 0.5–1.8%
  • Les Républicains (EPP): 6.8–10.3%
  • Reconquête (ESN): 3.8–6.5%
  • La France insoumise (GUE/NGL): 10.0–14.0%
  • Les Écologistes – Europe Écologie Les Verts (Greens/EFA): 3.4–6.0%
  • Renaissance–Mouvement démocrate–Horizons (RE): 13.2–17.7%
  • Rassemblement national (PfE): 32.2–38.1%
  • Debout la France (ECR): 1.3–3.1%
  • Parti communiste français (GUE/NGL): 2.1–4.2%
